title: hylocereus plumieri
intro: Hylocereus plumieri, also known as the queen of the night or night-blooming cereus, is a species of flowering cactus that produces fragrant and showy flowers that bloom in the evening and wilt by morning. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hylocereus plumieri include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Hylocereus plumieri can be made by infusing the flowers in hot water, making a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
